title: Brandywine Property
description: Schema representing a Brandywine Realty Trust commercial real estate asset (office, life science, mixed-use, multifamily, retail, or education).

propertyId.description: Unique identifier for the property within the Brandywine portfolio.

name.description: Property name or building name (e.g. 'Cira Centre', 'FMC Tower', '3151 Market').

address.description: Physical street address of the property.

market.description: Brandywine reporting market in which the property is located.

submarket.description: Submarket designation within the parent market (e.g. 'University City', 'Radnor', 'Conshohocken').

propertyType.description: Category of the property as classified by Brandywine.

developmentProject.description: Master-planned development the property belongs to (e.g. 'Schuylkill Yards', 'uCity Square', 'Uptown ATX', 'Broadmoor', 'Discovery Point').

squareFootage.description: Total rentable square footage of the building.

yearBuilt.description: Year the property was originally completed or delivered.

occupancyRate.description: Current occupancy rate as a percentage.

operationalStatus.description: Current lifecycle status of the property.

energyStarCertified.description: Whether the property holds ENERGY STAR certification.

amenities.description: On-site amenities (e.g. fitness center, conference center, food hall, parking).
